programs.title: Xploration DIY Sci S5 - "Classroom: Impossible"
programs.desc: Fourth grade teacher Sandra Sanchez has a problem – her class is a year behind in science after a season of virtual-only teaching.

programs.title: Xploration DIY Sci S5 - "Museum Of Science, Boston #1"
programs.desc: Host Steve Spangler and his sidekick Higginsworth explore the Museum of Science, Boston, for new do-it-yourself science tricks and experiments.

programs.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Reconnaissance"
programs.desc: Reconnaissance units operate behind enemy lines, using elite training to gather vital intelligence and expose an enemy’s strengths and weaknesses.

programs.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Coalition Training"
programs.desc: Allied forces train together to build teamwork and coordination, ensuring success in combat zones like Iraq and Afghanistan.

programs.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Damage Control School"
programs.desc: NATO sailors train to fight fire and floods at sea, mastering damage control under extreme heat, cold, and pressure to save their ship.

programs.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Navy Boarding Party"
programs.desc: Modern naval boarding teams train to enforce embargoes, stop smugglers, and confront armed pirates in some of the toughest maritime operations.
